backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that builds DuckDuckGo search URLs, makes HTTP outcalls via an OutCall module, and exposes `search`/`fetchSearchResults` public methods with error handling for failed outcalls.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties defining light and dark mode color tokens for the design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SecurelyTime app with meta, Open Graph, and canonical tags pointing to securelytime.com, loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/public/google0e657d46cb230404.h: Static Google Search Console site verification file served at its verification URL path.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the SearchInterface inside a full-height flex container.
frontend/src/components/InAppBrowser.tsx: Fullscreen modal iframe browser component with a URL bar, loading spinner, and a fallback panel when a site blocks embedding via X-Frame-Options or CSP.
Main search UI component that handles form submission, parses DuckDuckGo JSON results, renders abstract and related topics, and opens links in the InAppBrowser overlay.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: Custom React hook that calls a backend actor to perform searches, managing loading/error state and parsing ICP-specific error codes into user-friendly messages.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens plus a fadeIn animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility that detects URLs in plain text and converts them to clickable anchor elements or callback-triggered buttons, plus a helper to validate URL strings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based color tokens, custom fonts, shadows, border radii, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for SecurelyTime tracking schema version, existing/new feature requests, and a pending task to deploy the application to the Internet Computer production network.
